data.description:
## Reproduction Steps

Discovered while validating epic ce0e (xdist parallelization). The live-Jira
reconciler E2E `test_delete_permission_probe` flakes on Jira's search-index
eventual consistency when the *whole* live group runs (it self-skips in CI, so
this only bites a local live run with creds).

- `pytest tests/integration/test_reconcile_live_e2e.py` (all 12, SERIAL, no xdist)
  → `test_delete_permission_probe` FAILS: `AssertionError: created issue REB-NNNN
  never became index-visible` (observed REB-1105 and REB-1107 on two runs).
- `pytest "…::test_delete_permission_probe"` in ISOLATION (serial) → PASSES.

So the failure is load/timing dependent (many live tests hammering the shared
test project's index in one run outrun the test's index-visibility poll timeout),
NOT caused by xdist — it reproduces with `-n0`. Independent of epic ce0e's change.

## Expected vs Actual

- Expected: the index-visibility wait polls long enough (or backs off) to absorb
  Jira's eventual-consistency lag even when the full live group has just created
  many issues.
- Actual: the fixed poll budget in the visibility helper (`test_reconcile_live_e2e.py:347`)
  times out under group load and the test fails.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The index-visibility wait in `tests/integration/test_reconcile_live_e2e.py`
  is made robust to group-load lag (e.g. longer/adaptive backoff, or a
  create→visible retry helper) so the full live group passes reliably.
- [ ] `pytest tests/integration/test_reconcile_live_e2e.py` (all 12, serial) passes
  repeatedly against the live test project (no `never became index-visible`).
- [ ] No change to CI behavior (these tests still self-skip without live creds).
data.title: Live reconciler E2E test_delete_permission_probe flakes on Jira index-visibility under live-group load
